entities.name: CEREAL CROPS
entities.description: Major cereal crops including wheat, barley, oats, rice, and sorghum

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL BREEDING
entities.description: Traditional breeding approaches for crop improvement

entities.name: RAPID GENERATION ADVANCEMENT
entities.description: A technique to accelerate the crop growth period to increase the number of cycles per year

entities.name: SPEED BREEDING
entities.description: A method utilizing rapid generation advancement to reduce the crop growth period

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A cereal crop for which speed breeding protocols are available

entities.name: BARLEY
entities.description: A cereal crop for which speed breeding protocols are available

entities.name: OATS
entities.description: A cereal crop for which speed breeding protocols are available

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A cereal crop for which speed breeding protocols are available

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop for which speed breeding protocols are available

entities.name: LIGHT INTENSITY
entities.description: A factor modified in speed breeding to reduce the crop growth period

entities.name: LIGHT SPECTRUM
entities.description: The duration of exposure to different spectrums of light used to reduce the crop growth period

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: A factor modified in speed breeding to reduce the crop growth period

entities.name: RELATIVE HUMIDITY
entities.description: A factor modified in speed breeding to reduce the crop growth period

entities.name: CONTROLLED CONDITIONS
entities.description: The environment where speed breeding and precise phenotyping are conducted

entities.name: PHENOTYPING PLATFORMS
entities.description: Automatic, semi-automatic, aerial, and ground-based platforms for precise trait measurement

entities.name: SENSOR-BASED PHENOMICS
entities.description: Facilities using sensors for screening and profiling crop traits

entities.name: IMAGE-BASED PHENOMICS
entities.description: Facilities using images for screening and profiling crop traits

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to withstand biological stressors

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to withstand non-biological stressors

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL QUALITY TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics related to the nutritional value of the crop

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Physical and growth characteristics of the crop

entities.name: ROOT ARCHITECTURE
entities.description: The spatial configuration and structure of the root system

entities.name: UAVS
entities.description: Unmanned Aerial Vehicles used for recording agronomic traits of large populations

entities.name: DRONES
entities.description: Aerial vehicles used for recording agronomic traits of large populations

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A genomic tool used to accelerate genetic gains

entities.name: GENOMIC PREDICTION
entities.description: A genomic tool used to accelerate genetic gains

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: A genomic tool used to accelerate genetic gains

entities.name: GENOME EDITING
entities.description: A genomic tool used to accelerate genetic gains

entities.name: GENETIC GAINS
entities.description: The increase in the average performance of a crop population over time

entities.name: YIELD CEILING
entities.description: The maximum potential yield of a crop under specific conditions
